name: Moth Cry
short_description: Moth Cry is a non-linear visual novel about life and its consequences. Experience life alongside the main character. His fate is in your hands.
detailed_description:
Moth Cry is a non-linear visual novel, a socio-psychological drama, about life and its consequences. Experience life alongside the main character. His fate is in your hands.

Where will your story lead you? Will it be a tragedy with elements of comedy? Or perhaps it will turn into a thriller with adventure elements? Maybe you'll find yourself immersed in a melodrama? It all depends on you!

The relationships you build and the decisions you make will drastically alter your path. Charming characters and lively emotional dialogues will leave a lasting impression on you.

Everyone around you won't just love or hate you. It's within your power to build friendships, love, or simply remain acquaintances. Perhaps you'll even want to acquire dangerous enemies? It all depends solely on you.

Experience a story with branching narratives where your decisions truly matter. In Moth Cry, you'll have the chance to step into the shoes of a character from different social strata. Which social class your hero falls into depends on you, even if that choice isn't so obvious.

Unlock all the numerous endings of the intricate and non-linear story of life. Immerse yourself in the unimaginable atmosphere of Moth Cry and appreciate all the elegance of the musical accompaniment and artistic style.
